input_properties.custom_format:
<button type="button" acclass="clearBtn" onclick="execClearGridData(this)">クリア</button>

<script type="text/javascript">
function execClearGridData(buttonElement) {
    (function($){
        if (document.activeElement) {
            $(document.activeElement).blur();
        }

        var $tr = $(buttonElement).closest('tr');
        var rowId = $tr.attr('id');

        if (!rowId) {
            imuiAlert('rowIdを見つけてない，確認をお願い致します');
            return;
        }

        setTimeout(function() {
            try {
                var tableId = 'gt1_tb';

                var args = { data: {} };
                args.data[tableId] = [{}];
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_kamoku_cd'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_kamoku_nm'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_hojyo_cd'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_hojyo_nm'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_bumon_cd'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_bumon_nm'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_BUbunnrui'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_BUbunnruicyuu'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_seihinnburui'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_zeikubunn'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_naigaizei'] = '';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_zeink_kin'] = '0';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_syouhizei'] = '0';
                args.data[tableId][0]['gt1_zeikm_kin'] = '0';

                var option = { indexKey: rowId };
                formaItems.product_80_gridtable.setItemData[tableId](args, option);
            } catch (e) {
                imuiAlert('実行エラー: ' + e.message);
            }
        }, 50);
    })(jQuery);
}
</script>

item_properties.script:
var style = document.createElement('style');
style.textContent = [
    '.imui-form > thead > tr > th,',
    '.imui-form > tbody > tr > th,',
    '.imui-form > tfoot > tr > th {',
    '    background: #ADD8E6 !important;',
    '}',
    '.imfr_item_table_header {',
    '    background: #ADD8E6 !important;',
    '}',
    '.imfr_input_noframes[readonly] {',
    '    background-color: transparent !important;',
    '    background: none !important;',
    '    border: none !important;',
　'    box-shadow: none !important;',
    '}',
    '[item_type="product_72_shape"] > div {',
    '    background-color: #ADD8E6 !important;',
    '}',
    '#lpqwqdwytozp {',
    '    background-color: #ADD8E6 !important;',
    '}'
].join('');
document.head.appendChild(style);
